/* =========================================================
   HOMEPAGE HERO VIDEO
   ========================================================= */

/* Keep the existing image as a fallback while the video loads */
.home-hero {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Full-size background video */
.hero-video {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;

  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center center;

  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Keep the dark overlay above the video */
.home-hero-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* Keep the headline, paragraph, and buttons above everything */
.home-hero-content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

/* Smaller, more balanced headline */
.home-hero-content h1 {
  max-width: 760px;
  font-size: clamp(40px, 3.8vw, 58px);
  line-height: 1.08;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
}

/* Refined supporting paragraph */
.home-hero-content p {
  max-width: 650px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
}

/* Mobile adjustments */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .home-hero-content h1 {
    font-size: 38px;
    line-height: 1.08;
  }

  .home-hero-content p {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .hero-video {
    object-position: center center;
  }
}
